summary: Plan-only inventory assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge is recommended because the artifact does not include complete merge preflight proof for any PR. One narrow contributor-branch repair path is concrete for #92072; #92243 is routed to central security handling per deterministic validation, and the remaining PRs need maintainer review or author/CI follow-up.

actions.reason: Potentially viable PR, but merge cannot be planned without complete merge preflight proof and current maintainer review context.
Docs-only PR appears narrow, but a failing required-style CI signal and missing merge preflight proof require maintainer/CI triage before finalization.
Active author-followup label, broad message-delivery surface, failing checks, and unresolved bot-review proof make this a maintainer decision rather than an automated merge or repair plan.

Narrow repair is concrete: update or minimally adjust the gateway capability shim/tests on the contributor branch, then rerun targeted tests, check:changed, and Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
Exact PR #92243 is quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; no GitHub mutation or fix action is planned for this security-sensitive target.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #92072 so google-gemini-cli Gemini models remain image-capable at the gateway attachment capability gate, with focused tests proving catalog-entry and missing-entry behavior. Preserve HaozheZhang6 credit and do not broaden into general provider-catalog normalization.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): repair Gemini CLI image capability handling
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the #92072 gateway capability fix on the contributor branch.
- Keep google-gemini-cli Gemini models image-capable when catalog data is stale or missing.
- Preserve the narrow scope; broader provider-catalog normalization remains out of scope.

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92072 by HaozheZhang6. Clownfish should preserve attribution in the repaired branch or any replacement PR.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review before merge recommendation
credit_notes: Credit HaozheZhang6 for the original google-gemini-cli image capability fix.
